description_long: This is a two-story hardware store with a timber-framed facade and a steep, dark brown gabled roof featuring a single chimney. The ground floor is partially open, supported by wooden posts, and includes a workbench with tools and a barrel, suggesting an area for outdoor work or display. The upper floor has a grid of wooden beams and small windows, with the main entrance and a large wooden door located on the front side. The rear of the building features a prominent central chimney and additional storage or workspace, visible through an open section. The structure is set on a flat, gray base, and the overall design is reminiscent of traditional European vernacular architecture. The exterior is primarily composed of wood and plaster, with some metal elements for the chimney and tools.
description: A timber-framed, two-story hardware store with a gabled roof, open ground floor workspace, and visible tools and barrels. The facade features wooden beams, small windows, and a large front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the timber-framed facade, open ground floor with a workbench and tools, and the main entrance above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large wooden door, two windows, and the extended roofline; the workbench is partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain timber-framed wall and the chimney extending from the roof.
description_view_3: Back view with a central chimney, a barrel, and an open section revealing additional workspace or storage.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features an open ground floor workspace with a workbench and barrel, a main entrance above, and a large wooden door on the side. Timber framing and small windows are visible on the upper floor.
